---
description: "Use when adding new gear slots, implementing equip visuals, or extending the modular character pipeline with Character Creator - Fantasy defaults."
name: "Equipment Pipeline"
argument-hint: "Describe the equipment feature or content batch"
agent: "agent"
---
Implement or extend the equipment pipeline.

## Requirements
- Default pipeline assumptions: Character Creator - Fantasy + Sprite Library/Resolver.
- Slots must match approved schema.
- Item definitions must map to visual labels.
- Save/load compatibility must be preserved.

## Output
1. Data changes.
2. Visual mapping changes.
3. Runtime equip/unequip logic updates.
4. Backward compatibility notes.
5. QA scenarios.
